title: 2nd Impact
wikitext:
[]: 2nd Impact             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Wed Jul 19, 2006 3:00 pm In the beginning of Death, and also in episode 21', we get a glimpse of the second impact. I've looked at a number of translations and even at the Eva Commentary website. But, they all leave me with a number of questions. 1) Why are they going to try to dissipate heat as soon as the Door(s) of Guf open? What the heck does heat have to do with the Door(s) of Guf, anyway? And why would it suddenly open up once Adam is walking around? It's not like they were opening up when the other Angels were attacking. 2) What is this "explosive mechanism" or "detonator" that is linked to the S2 engine? There is a countdown, for sure. Is the big explosion seen a result of Adam's S2 engine blowing up? Is that what really caused the 2nd Impact? 3) How the heck did they manage to restore Adam to an embryo. After he has wrecked the place, he is still very much alive and well. I don't see who was left alive to take care of him. If anyone can answer these questions, that would be awesome! Thanks a lot!

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Wed Jul 19, 2006 3:09 pm I'd like to know too. But what is the Door of Guf? I don't know that either. I'm not familiar with the Khabbala. Yet. :twisted:

[]: Re: 2nd Impact             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 19, 2006 4:55 pm BrikHaus81 wrote: But, they all leave me with a number of questions.

[]: Re: 2nd Impact             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Wed Jul 19, 2006 5:12 pm Reichu wrote: Are you talking about the reduction to an egg "to reduce the damage", or the restoration to embryo state that happened afterwards?

[]: Re: 2nd Impact             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 19, 2006 5:30 pm BrikHaus81 wrote: I guess both, I wasn't aware there were two separate incidents of reducing Adam.

[]:             Quote Post by InvaderRen » Wed Jul 19, 2006 8:56 pm it just occured to me, what kind of egg? Adam IS the second human... wouldnt that mean a 'human' egg? where did it gestate? poor lady... whoever they put it into... or Lilith :twisted:

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Jul 19, 2006 9:30 pm InvaderRen wrote: Adam IS the second human... wouldnt that mean a 'human' egg?

[]:             Quote Post by InvaderRen » Wed Jul 19, 2006 9:51 pm adam is the second human, eh? and how exactly does a human egg look? Tiny and needing of outside support... And being a human egg, it needs to gestate, somewhere... :?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jul 20, 2006 12:36 am In episode #09, Gendo comments that Adam is the first human. Not totally wrong, either: Adam was the first human being on EARTH. (In the NGE universe.) What kind of "egg" is ambiguous. An egg cell? An egg inside a shell? Well, look at the blurry photo and decide. Nobody had to gestate anything. (Except possibly Lilith, with EVA-01.) They grew Adam in a petri dish or something. ;)

Article: 2nd Impact
[]: 2nd Impact             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Wed Jul 19, 2006 3:00 pm In the beginning of Death, and also in episode 21', we get a glimpse of the second impact. I've looked at a number of translations and even at the Eva Commentary website. But, they all leave me with a number of questions. 1) Why are they going to try to dissipate heat as soon as the Door(s) of Guf open? What the heck does heat have to do with the Door(s) of Guf, anyway? And why would it suddenly open up once Adam is walking around? It's not like they were opening up when the other Angels were attacking. 2) What is this "explosive mechanism" or "detonator" that is linked to the S2 engine? There is a countdown, for sure. Is the big explosion seen a result of Adam's S2 engine blowing up? Is that what really caused the 2nd Impact? 3) How the heck did they manage to restore Adam to an embryo. After he has wrecked the place, he is still very much alive and well. I don't see who was left alive to take care of him. If anyone can answer these questions, that would be awesome! Thanks a lot!

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Wed Jul 19, 2006 3:09 pm I'd like to know too. But what is the Door of Guf? I don't know that either. I'm not familiar with the Khabbala. Yet. :twisted:

(Except possibly Lilith, with EVA-01.) They grew Adam in a petri dish or something. ;)
